previewText:
The biggest mistake when translating videos

Hey Viktoria,

many people think that subtitles are enough to reach international audiences. But that is the biggest mistake.

Because understanding alone is not enough.

People don't connect through text, they connect through voice, tone, and emotion.

If these are missing or don't sound genuine, your video automatically comes across as distant and loses its impact.
